summary:
The Barthel Index only measures physical ADLs and fails to capture essential aspects like cognition, emotions, or social engagement critical for comprehensive post-stroke quality of life assessment. More robust tools evaluating diverse functional domains provide a more accurate picture than isolated metrics like the Barthel Index.
